Game.Name: Seijuu Maden Beasts & Blades (Japan)
Game.plot: Seijuu Maden Beasts & Blades is a Strategy game, published by Bullet Proof Software,which was released in Japan in 1995.
Game.Notes: Seijuu Maden Beasts & Blades ("Sacred Beast Magic Legend Beasts & Blades", roughly) is an isometric RPG for the Super Famicom. The game uses a tactical turn-based combat system, with characters and enemies moving across a grid-like map to line up attacks and perform other actions. The player-named protagonist collects allies as he travels the world, exploring dungeons and speaking to NPCs in towns to further the plot. The inspiration for Seijuu Maden was taken from a reader's letters contest to create an idea for a video game hosted by Dengeki Super Famicom, a popular Japanese gaming magazine that focused on the titular system and is now published under the name of Dengeki Nintendo.
